form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into eleventh behind Nob Hill at this track over 2700m in a 2yo G2 fillies restricted race on December 13 at $71. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 6.5m win at Les Sables-d'olonne beating Nizza Rocca in 2yo race on August 9. Keep him in mind.
